title: ODA Classification Review
description: Interactive tool for reviewing and validating AI-generated ODA project classifications. Browse flagged items, accept or override predictions, and export reviewed results.

title: Any Funding Tracker
description: Dashboard for tracking funding flows and aid disbursements across donors and recipients. Filter by country, sector, and time period.

title: Frontier AI Workforce
description: Dashboard tracking AI workforce trends across leading AI labs (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI). Scraped, classified, and visualized job postings by role and region.

title: Frontier AI Workforce — Treemap
description: Treemap breakdown of AI lab job postings by department and role category.
